props.name: disabled
props.description: Determines if an element is disabled. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-disabled

props.name: active
props.description: Determines if an element is active via user interaction, keydown, mousedown and touch. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/:active

props.name: expanded
props.description: Determines if an element is expanded, typically following a disclosure pattern. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

props.name: pressed
props.description: Determines if an element is pressed as a stand alone interaction. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

props.name: selected
props.description: Deterimines if an element is selected and part of a multi choice selection group. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

props.name: readonly
props.description: Sets a interactive element to be in a readonly content state. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

props.name: value
props.description: Defines the value associated with the elmeents's name when it's submitted with the form data. This value is passed to the server in params when the form is submitted using this button. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input#value

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the element, submitted as a pair with the element value as part of the form data. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

props.name: closable
props.description: Determines if the element can be closed by the user.

props.name: i18n
props.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

props.name: current
props.description: This Boolean attribute sets the current state, used to represent the current page or navigation link. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-current

props.name: inlinePosition
props.description: Determines the position of an element along the inline axis. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Box_alignment_in_grid_layout#the_two_axes_of_a_grid_layout

props.name: blockPosition
props.description: Determines the position of an element along the block axis. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Box_alignment_in_grid_layout#the_two_axes_of_a_grid_layout

props.name: layout
props.description: Determines the overall layout of the element.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Determines the orientation of an element.

props.name: prominence
props.description: Determines the visual prominence or weight of an element

props.name: interaction
props.description: Provides a way to indicate the intended use case for a button or similar interactive element. This can help users quickly understand what each interaction will do and reduce the potential for confusion or errors.

props.name: color
props.description: Defines a base color from the theme color palette

props.name: status
props.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

props.name: size
props.description: Determines the size options of a given element

props.name: container
props.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

props.name: position
props.description: Determines the position of an element along both inline and block axis. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Box_alignment_in_grid_layout#the_two_axes_of_a_grid_layout

props.name: alignment
props.description: Determines the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

props.name: anchor
props.description: Provides the element that the popover should position relative to. Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event. A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

props.name: slots
props.description: Defines what public Slot names are available to the element.

@nvidia-elements/core.name: @nvidia-elements/core
@nvidia-elements/core.readme:
# Elements ### The Design Language for AI/ML Factories Building at the Speed of Light - [Documentation](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/about-getting-started--docs) - [Slack Support](https://nvidia.slack.com/archives/C03BDL2UCGK) - [Changelog](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/about-changelog--docs) - [Gitlab Repo](https://github.com/NVIDIA/elements) - [Package Artifactory URM](https://registry.npmjs.org [Package Artifactory Maglev](ui/packages/npm:%2F%2F@nvidia-elements%2Fcore) ## Getting Started ```bash # local .npmrc file registry=https://registry.npmjs.org https://registry.npmjs.org login # install core dependencies npm install @nvidia-elements/themes @nvidia-elements/core ``` ```css /* import the global CSS into your project */ @import '@nvidia-elements/themes/fonts/inter.css'; @import '@nvidia-elements/themes/index.css'; @import '@nvidia-elements/themes/dark.css'; ``` ```javascript // Load via JavaScript imports to make available in HTML templates import '@nvidia-elements/core/button/define.js'; ``` ```html hello there ``` ## Framework Integrations - [Angular](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/integrations-angular--docs) - [Lit](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/integrations-lit--docs) - [Preact](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/integrations-preact--docs) - [React](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/integrations-react--docs) - [TypeScript](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/integrations-typescript--docs) - [Vue](https://NVIDIA.github.io/elements/api/?path=/docs/integrations-Vue--docs) ## Development - `ci`: run full build/lint/test as well as demo/storybook apps against final output - `build`: run library build - `dev`: run storybook and build in watch mode - `test`: run unit tests - `test:watch`: run unit tets in watch mode All component development is currently done within a Storybook build: ```bash pnpm dev ```
## Testing Run unit tests with coverage report: ```bash pnpm test ``` Develop unit tests with watcher enabled: ```bash pnpm test:watch ```

properties.name: i18n

properties.name: container
properties.description: Determines the container styles of component. Flat is used for nesting accordions within other containers. Inset can be used for more complex accordions where content is distinctly separated.

properties.name: expanded
properties.description: Determines whether the accordion is expanded, displaying its contents, or not.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Determines whether the accordion is expandable

elements.name: nve-alert
elements.description: Alert is an element that displays a brief, important message in a way that attracts the user's attention without interrupting the user's task.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Defines visual treatment to represent a ongoing task or support status.

properties.name: closable
properties.description: When used in an `alert-group` the `closable` property enables alerts to be dismissed within the same group.

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

slots.description: Icon slot is placed on the left side of the alert. Icons are typically used to represent the alert's status.
slots.name: icon

slots.description: Prefix slot is placed between the icon and the content. Prefixes are typically used to represent the alert's status.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: Actions are placed on the right side of the alert. Actions are typically buttons, but can also be links. Actions should be used for actions that the user can take to resolve the alert.
slots.name: actions

slots.description: Default content placed inside of the alert.

elements.name: nve-button
elements.description: A button is a widget that enables users to trigger an action or event, such as submitting a form, opening a dialog, canceling an action, or performing a delete operation.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Determines the container of the button. Flat is used for nesting within other containers or more muted style. Inline is used for inline content such as text.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Determines size of the button.

properties.name: interaction
properties.description: The Interaction type provides a way to indicate the intended use case for a button or other interactive element. This can help users quickly understand what each interaction will do and reduce the potential for confusion or errors.

properties.name: pressed
properties.description:
Use for buttons that are toggle button types.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

properties.name: expanded
properties.description:
Use for button that are used for expanding/collapsing content.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

properties.name: readonly
properties.description:
Similar to input readonly, sets a button sematically as visual treatment only
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

properties.name: name
properties.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's value as part of the form data, when that button is used to submit the form.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

properties.name: value
properties.description:
Defines the value associated with the button's name when it's submitted with the form data. This value is passed to the server in params when the form is submitted using this button.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-value

properties.name: type
properties.description:
Defines the button behavior when associated within an <form> element.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-type

properties.name: disabled
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the user from interacting with the button: it cannot be pressed or focused.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-disabled

properties.name: selected
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the selected state if button is part of a multi choice selection group
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

properties.name: current
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute sets the current state, used to represent the current page or navigation link
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-current

slots.description: slot for button text content or icon, icon placement determined by whether `icon` is inserted before or after text content.

attributes.name: container
attributes.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Determines the size options of a given element

attributes.name: interaction
attributes.description: Provides a way to indicate the intended use case for a button or similar interactive element. This can help users quickly understand what each interaction will do and reduce the potential for confusion or errors.

attributes.name: pressed
attributes.description: Determines if an element is pressed as a stand alone interaction. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Determines if an element is expanded, typically following a disclosure pattern. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets a interactive element to be in a readonly content state. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the element, submitted as a pair with the element value as part of the form data. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Defines the value associated with the elmeents's name when it's submitted with the form data. This value is passed to the server in params when the form is submitted using this button. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input#value

attributes.name: type
attributes.description:
Defines the button behavior when associated within an <form> element.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-type

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Determines if an element is disabled. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-disabled

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Deterimines if an element is selected and part of a multi choice selection group. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

attributes.name: current
attributes.description: This Boolean attribute sets the current state, used to represent the current page or navigation link. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-current

elements.name: nve-button-group
elements.description: A button group is a control that enables users to choose between two or more distinct mutually exclusive options.

properties.name: behaviorSelect
properties.description: By default the button group is stateless. Add the `behavior-select` attribute and set to `single` or `multi` to enable stateful selction handling.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Set the style of the button group using the `container` property. Options are the default display when the attribute is left off, `flat` or `rounded`.

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Determines the orientation direction of the group. Vertical groups are limited to icon buttons only.

properties.name: interaction
properties.description: The `interaction` property is intended to be used on `button-group` in combination with `divider` for color-coded split buttons

properties.name: size
properties.description: Determines size of button

attributes.name: behavior-select
attributes.description: By default the button group is stateless. Add the `behavior-select` attribute and set to `single` or `multi` to enable stateful selction handling.

attributes.name: container
attributes.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Determines the orientation of an element.

attributes.name: interaction
attributes.description: Provides a way to indicate the intended use case for a button or similar interactive element. This can help users quickly understand what each interaction will do and reduce the potential for confusion or errors.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Determines the size options of a given element

elements.name: nve-checkbox
elements.description: A checkbox is a control that enables users to choose between two distinct mutually exclusive options (checked or unchecked, on or off) through a single click or tap.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Set current visaul state for control. This overrides any validation states active.

properties.name: layout
properties.description: Set current control + label + control message layout. Layouts will collapse based on available container space.

properties.name: fitText
properties.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

properties.name: fitContent
properties.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

properties.name: reset
properties.description: Resets control value to initial attribute value and clears any active validation rules.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description: Determines the overall layout of the element.

attributes.name: fit-text
attributes.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

attributes.name: fit-content
attributes.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

elements.name: nve-copy-button
elements.description: A copy button is a button that easily enables the copy to clipboard pattern.

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

properties.name: behaviorCopy
properties.description: Determines if the copy button should auto write to clipboard by the trigger.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Defines the value to be copied to user clipboard. Use `aria-label` to set the tooltip hint.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Determines the container of the button. Flat is used for nesting within other containers or more muted style. Inline is used for inline content such as text.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Determines size of the button.

properties.name: interaction
properties.description: The Interaction type provides a way to indicate the intended use case for a button or other interactive element. This can help users quickly understand what each interaction will do and reduce the potential for confusion or errors.

properties.name: pressed
properties.description:
Use for buttons that are toggle button types.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

properties.name: expanded
properties.description:
Use for button that are used for expanding/collapsing content.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

properties.name: readonly
properties.description:
Similar to input readonly, sets a button sematically as visual treatment only
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

properties.name: name
properties.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's value as part of the form data, when that button is used to submit the form.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

properties.name: type
properties.description:
Defines the button behavior when associated within an <form> element.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-type

properties.name: disabled
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the user from interacting with the button: it cannot be pressed or focused.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-disabled

properties.name: selected
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the selected state if button is part of a multi choice selection group
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

properties.name: current
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute sets the current state, used to represent the current page or navigation link
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-current

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

attributes.name: behavior-copy
attributes.description: Determines if the copy button should auto write to clipboard by the trigger.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Defines the value associated with the elmeents's name when it's submitted with the form data. This value is passed to the server in params when the form is submitted using this button. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input#value

  customElements.define('dialog-test-shadow-root', class DialogTestShadowRoot extends HTMLElement {
    constructor() {
      super();
      this._shadow = this.attachShadow({mode: 'open'});

      const template = document.createElement('template');
      template.innerHTML = \
        <style>:host { box-sizing: border-box; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; }</style>

<!-- experimental demo, not stable! -->
<section id="dropdown-group">
  <nve-dropdown popover-type="manual" id="menu-1">
    <nve-menu>
      <nve-menu-item popovertarget="menu-2"
        >item 1-1 <nve-icon name="caret" direction="right" size="sm" slot="suffix"></nve-icon
      ></nve-menu-item>
      <nve-menu-item>item 1-2</nve-menu-item>
      <nve-menu-item>item 1-3</nve-menu-item>
    </nve-menu>
  </nve-dropdown>

  <nve-dropdown popover-type="manual" id="menu-2" position="right" alignment="start">
    <nve-menu>
      <nve-menu-item>item 2-1</nve-menu-item>
      <nve-menu-item popovertarget="menu-3"
        >item 2-2 <nve-icon name="caret" direction="right" size="sm" slot="suffix"></nve-icon
      ></nve-menu-item>
      <nve-menu-item>item 2-3</nve-menu-item>
    </nve-menu>
  </nve-dropdown>

  <nve-dropdown popover-type="manual" id="menu-3" position="right" alignment="start">
    <nve-menu>
      <nve-menu-item>item 3-1</nve-menu-item>
      <nve-menu-item>item 3-2</nve-menu-item>
      <nve-menu-item>item 3-3</nve-menu-item>
    </nve-menu>
  </nve-dropdown>
</section>

<script type="module">
  const group = document.querySelector("#dropdown-group");

  globalThis.document.addEventListener("pointerup", (e) => {
    if (
      Array.from(group.querySelectorAll("nve-dropdown")).every((dropdown) => clickOutsideElementBounds(e, dropdown))
    ) {
      group.querySelectorAll("nve-dropdown").forEach((d) => d.hidePopover());
    }
  });

  function clickOutsideElementBounds(event, element) {
    const { left, right, top, bottom } = element.getBoundingClientRect();
    return event.clientX < left || event.clientX > right || event.clientY < top || event.clientY > bottom;
  }
</script>

elements.name: nve-grid
elements.description: A grid widget is a container that enables users to navigate the information or interactive elements it contains using directional navigation keys, such as arrow keys, Home, and End. As a generic container widget that offers flexible keyboard navigation, it can serve a wide variety of needs. It can be used for purposes as simple as grouping a collection of checkboxes or navigation links or as complex as creating a full-featured spreadsheet application. - ARIA Authoring Practices Guide

properties.name: container
properties.description: Determines the container styles of component. Flat is used for nesting the grid within other containers. Full can be used for full edge to edge viewport width grids.

properties.name: stripe
properties.description: Determine style variant stripe rows

attributes.name: container
attributes.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

attributes.name: stripe
attributes.description: Determine style variant stripe rows

properties.name: width
properties.description:
Columns can individually have set widths using the `width` property or attribute and a valid CSS value type.
If the total width of all columns is less than the grid width then the last column will fill the remaining space.
By default columns are evenly devided unless width is explicitly provided. Content within a cell of a given
column will wrap content to fit the width of the column.

properties.name: position
properties.description:
The `position` property or attribute can be set to `fixed` or `sticky` to make the column fixed or sticky.
Fixed columns will not scroll horizontally with the grid. Sticky columns will scroll horizontally with the grid
until the column reaches the edge of the grid.

properties.name: columnAlign
properties.description: Control the content alignment within a given column.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description:
Columns can individually have set widths using the `width` property or attribute and a valid CSS value type.
If the total width of all columns is less than the grid width then the last column will fill the remaining space.
By default columns are evenly devided unless width is explicitly provided. Content within a cell of a given
column will wrap content to fit the width of the column.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Determines the position of an element along both inline and block axis. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Box_alignment_in_grid_layout#the_two_axes_of_a_grid_layout

attributes.name: column-align
attributes.description: Control the content alignment within a given column.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: The `selected` property or attribute can be set to `true` to indicate that the row is in a selected state.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Deterimines if an element is selected and part of a multi choice selection group. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

elements.name: nve-icon
elements.description: An icon is a graphic symbol designed to visually indicate the purpose of an interface element.

properties.name: status

properties.name: size

properties.name: direction
properties.description: Sets the direction of the icon. Only supported by expand-panel/collapse-panel (horizontal axis) and arrow/caret/chevron icons (4-directions)

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the icon SVG sprite to render.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the element, submitted as a pair with the element value as part of the form data. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

elements.name: nve-icon-button
elements.description: An icon button is a button that displays only an icon without a visual label.

properties.name: iconName
properties.description: Sets the icon name, which determines which icon to display.

properties.name: direction
properties.description:
Sets the direction of the icon.
Only supported by expand-panel/collapse-panel (horizontal axis) and arrow/caret/chevron icons (4-directions)

properties.name: size
properties.description: Sets size of the icon button.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Determines the container of the button. Flat is used for nesting within other containers or more muted style. Inline is used for inline content such as text.

properties.name: interaction
properties.description: The Interaction type provides a way to indicate the intended use case for a button or other interactive element. This can help users quickly understand what each interaction will do and reduce the potential for confusion or errors.

properties.name: pressed
properties.description:
Use for buttons that are toggle button types.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

properties.name: expanded
properties.description:
Use for button that are used for expanding/collapsing content.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

properties.name: readonly
properties.description:
Similar to input readonly, sets a button sematically as visual treatment only
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

properties.name: name
properties.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's value as part of the form data, when that button is used to submit the form.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

properties.name: value
properties.description:
Defines the value associated with the button's name when it's submitted with the form data. This value is passed to the server in params when the form is submitted using this button.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-value

properties.name: type
properties.description:
Defines the button behavior when associated within an <form> element.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-type

properties.name: disabled
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the user from interacting with the button: it cannot be pressed or focused.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-disabled

properties.name: selected
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the selected state if button is part of a multi choice selection group
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

properties.name: current
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute sets the current state, used to represent the current page or navigation link
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-current

attributes.name: icon-name
attributes.description: Sets the icon name, which determines which icon to display.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description:
Sets the direction of the icon.
Only supported by expand-panel/collapse-panel (horizontal axis) and arrow/caret/chevron icons (4-directions)

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Determines the size options of a given element

attributes.name: container
attributes.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

attributes.name: interaction
attributes.description: Provides a way to indicate the intended use case for a button or similar interactive element. This can help users quickly understand what each interaction will do and reduce the potential for confusion or errors.

attributes.name: pressed
attributes.description: Determines if an element is pressed as a stand alone interaction. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Determines if an element is expanded, typically following a disclosure pattern. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets a interactive element to be in a readonly content state. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

attributes.name: name

attributes.name: selected

elements.name: nve-input
elements.description: An input is a control that enables users to enter text.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Sets the container type style. Flat is used for inline inputs that are often embeded in other containers or toolbars.

properties.name: rounded
properties.description: Sets the rounded visual style of the input.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Set current visaul state for control. This overrides any validation states active.

properties.name: layout
properties.description: Set current control + label + control message layout. Layouts will collapse based on available container space.

properties.name: fitText
properties.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

properties.name: fitContent
properties.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

properties.name: reset
properties.description: Resets control value to initial attribute value and clears any active validation rules.

attributes.name: container
attributes.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

attributes.name: rounded
attributes.description: Sets the rounded visual style of the input.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description: Determines the overall layout of the element.

attributes.name: fit-text
attributes.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

attributes.name: fit-content
attributes.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

elements.name: nve-menu
elements.description: A menu is a widget that offers a list of choices to the user, such as a set of actions or functions. Menu widgets behave like native operating system menus, such as the menus that pull down from the menubars commonly found at the top of many desktop application windows. A menu is usually opened, or made visible, by activating a menu button, choosing an item in a menu that opens a sub menu, or by invoking a command, such as Shift + F10 in Windows, that opens a context specific menu. - ARIA Authoring Practices Guide

properties.name: disabled

This Boolean attribute prevents the user from interacting with the button: it cannot be pressed or focused.

properties.name: selected
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the selected state if button is part of a multi choice selection group

elements.name: nve-notification
elements.description: Displays real time updates without interrupting the user's workflow to communicate an important message or status.

properties.name: anchor
properties.description:
The anchor provides the element that the popover should position relative to.
Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

properties.name: trigger
properties.description:
The trigger defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event.
A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

properties.name: position
properties.description: Sets the side position of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: Sets the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

properties.name: behaviorTrigger
properties.description: Determines if popover visibility behavior should be automatically controlled by the trigger.

properties.name: closable
properties.description: Determines if a close button should render within notification.

properties.name: closeTimeout
properties.description: A delayed `close` event will occur determined from the provided millisecond value.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Determines the visual status of the notification.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Flat container option is used when embeding within another containing element such as a drawer.

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

attributes.name: anchor
attributes.description: Provides the element that the popover should position relative to. Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: Defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event. A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Determines the position of an element along both inline and block axis. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Box_alignment_in_grid_layout#the_two_axes_of_a_grid_layout

attributes.name: alignment
attributes.description: Determines the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

attributes.name: behavior-trigger
attributes.description: Determines if popover visibility behavior should be automatically controlled by the trigger.

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Determines if the element can be closed by the user.

attributes.name: close-timeout
attributes.description: A delayed `close` event will occur determined from the provided millisecond value.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

attributes.name: container
attributes.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

events.name: close
events.description: Dispatched when the notification is closed.
Dispatched when the notification is opened.
events.name: open

<script type="module">
  const pagination = document.querySelector("nve-pagination");
  let items = loadItems();

  pagination.addEventListener("last-page", async () => {
    items = [...items, ...loadItems()];
    pagination.items = items.length;
  });

  function loadItems() {
    return new Array(100).fill("");
  }
</script>

elements.name: nve-sort-button
elements.description: A sort button is a control that enables users to sort a list of items in ascending or descending order.

properties.name: sort
properties.description: The current sort value, can be ascending, descending, or none.

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

properties.name: pressed
properties.description:
Use for buttons that are toggle button types.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

properties.name: expanded
properties.description:
Use for button that are used for expanding/collapsing content.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

properties.name: readonly
properties.description:
Similar to input readonly, sets a button sematically as visual treatment only
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

properties.name: name
properties.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's value as part of the form data, when that button is used to submit the form.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

properties.name: value
properties.description:
Defines the value associated with the button's name when it's submitted with the form data. This value is passed to the server in params when the form is submitted using this button.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-value

properties.name: type
properties.description:
Defines the button behavior when associated within an <form> element.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-type

properties.name: disabled
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the user from interacting with the button: it cannot be pressed or focused.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-disabled

properties.name: selected
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the selected state if button is part of a multi choice selection group
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

properties.name: current
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute sets the current state, used to represent the current page or navigation link
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-current

properties.name: selected
properties.description: Determines which tab item is selected, defaults to false.

properties.name: pressed
properties.description:
Use for buttons that are toggle button types.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-pressed

properties.name: expanded
properties.description:
Use for button that are used for expanding/collapsing content.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

properties.name: readonly
properties.description:
Similar to input readonly, sets a button sematically as visual treatment only
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly

properties.name: name
properties.description:
The name of the button, submitted as a pair with the button's value as part of the form data, when that button is used to submit the form.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-name

properties.name: value
properties.description:
Defines the value associated with the button's name when it's submitted with the form data. This value is passed to the server in params when the form is submitted using this button.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-value

properties.name: type
properties.description:
Defines the button behavior when associated within an <form> element.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-type

properties.name: disabled
properties.description:
This Boolean attribute prevents the user from interacting with the button: it cannot be pressed or focused.
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-disabled

properties.name: current

elements.name: nve-textarea
elements.description: A textarea is a control that enables users to enter and edit text.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Set current visaul state for control. This overrides any validation states active.

properties.name: layout
properties.description: Set current control + label + control message layout. Layouts will collapse based on available container space.

properties.name: fitText
properties.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

properties.name: fitContent
properties.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

properties.name: reset
properties.description: Resets control value to initial attribute value and clears any active validation rules.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description: Determines the overall layout of the element.

attributes.name: fit-text
attributes.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

attributes.name: fit-content
attributes.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

elements.name: nve-toast
elements.description: A contextual popup that displays a status. Toasts are [triggered](https://w3c.github.io/aria/#tooltip) by clicking, focusing, or tapping an element and cannot have interactive elements within them.

properties.name: anchor
properties.description:
The anchor provides the element that the popover should position relative to.
Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

properties.name: trigger
properties.description:
The trigger defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event.
A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

properties.name: position
properties.description: Sets the side position of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: Sets the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

properties.name: behaviorTrigger
properties.description: Determines if popover visibility behavior should be automatically controlled by the trigger.

properties.name: closable
properties.description: Determines if a close button should render within toast.

properties.name: closeTimeout
properties.description: A delayed `close` event will occur determined from the provided millisecond value.

properties.name: status
properties.description: visual treatment to represent a ongoing task or support status

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

attributes.name: anchor
attributes.description: Provides the element that the popover should position relative to. Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: Defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event. A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Determines the position of an element along both inline and block axis. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Box_alignment_in_grid_layout#the_two_axes_of_a_grid_layout

attributes.name: alignment
attributes.description: Determines the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

attributes.name: behavior-trigger
attributes.description: Determines if popover visibility behavior should be automatically controlled by the trigger.

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Determines if the element can be closed by the user.

attributes.name: close-timeout
attributes.description: A delayed `close` event will occur determined from the provided millisecond value.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

events.description: Dispatched when the toast is opened.
events.name: open

events.description: Dispatched when the toast is closed.
events.name: close

<toast-test-shadow-root></toast-test-shadow-root>
<script type="module">
  customElements.define('toast-test-shadow-root', class ToastTestShadowRoot extends HTMLElement {
    constructor() {
      super();
      this._shadow = this.attachShadow({mode: 'open'});

      const template = document.createElement('template');
      template.innerHTML = \
        <style>:host { box-sizing: border-box; }</style>
        <nve-toast size="sm">center</nve-toast>

        <nve-toast size="sm" position="top">top center</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="top" alignment="start">top start</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="top" alignment="end">top end</nve-toast>

        <nve-toast size="sm" position="right" alignment="start">right start</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="right">right center</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="right" alignment="end">right end</nve-toast>

        <nve-toast size="sm" position="bottom" alignment="start">bottom start</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="bottom">bottom center</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="bottom" alignment="end">bottom end</nve-toast>

        <nve-toast size="sm" position="left" alignment="start">left start</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="left">left center</nve-toast>
        <nve-toast size="sm" position="left" alignment="end">left end</nve-toast>
      \;
      this._shadow.appendChild(template.content);
    }
  });
</script>

elements.name: nve-toggletip
elements.description: Generic toggletip element for rendering a variety of different content within a toggletip container.

properties.name: anchor
properties.description:
The anchor provides the element that the popover should position relative to.
Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

properties.name: trigger
properties.description:
The trigger defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event.
A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

properties.name: position
properties.description: Sets the side position of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description:
Sets the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.
If an arrow exists the alginment will be relative to the arrow against the anchor.

properties.name: behaviorTrigger
properties.description: Determines if popover visibility behavior should be automatically controlled by the trigger.

properties.name: closable
properties.description: Determines if a close button should render within toggletip.

properties.name: arrow
properties.description: Determines if an arrow should be rendered.

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

elements.name: nve-toolbar
elements.description: A toolbar is a container for grouping a set of controls, such as buttons, icon buttons and combobox search.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Determines the container styles of component. Flat is used for nesting elements within other containers or more muted style. Full is used when the element expands the full width of the viewport.

properties.name: content
properties.description: Determines the primary content overflow behavior.

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Determines the orientation direction of the toolbar. Vertical toolbars are limited to icon buttons only.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Visual treatment to represent accent color for interactive selections

attributes.name: container
attributes.description:
Determines the container bounds of the element
- `flat` element has white space bounds but reduced visual container
- `inline` element container is reduced to fit within inline content such as a block of text
- `inset` element container is optimized for embeding or being inset inside another containing element
- `full` element container is optimized for filling its container bounds

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Determines the primary content overflow behavior.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Determines the orientation of an element.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

elements.name: nve-tree
elements.description: A tree view widget presents a hierarchical list. Any item in the hierarchy may have child items, and items that have children may be expanded or collapsed to show or hide the children.

properties.name: selectable
properties.description: Determines whether all nodes can be in a selected state. Nodes can be in a single or multi select state.

properties.name: behaviorExpand
properties.description: Determines whether or not the tree nodes should handle auto-expanding behavior.

properties.name: behaviorSelect
properties.description: Determines whether or not the tree nodes should handle auto-select behavior.

properties.name: border
properties.description: Determines if node depth border is rendered.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Determines whether all nodes can be in a selected state. Nodes can be in a single or multi select state.

attributes.name: behavior-expand
attributes.description: Determines whether or not the tree nodes should handle auto-expanding behavior.

attributes.name: behavior-select
attributes.description: Determines whether or not the tree nodes should handle auto-select behavior.

attributes.name: border
attributes.description: Determines if node depth border is rendered.

elements.name: nve-tree-node
elements.description: A tree view widget presents a hierarchical list. Any item in the hierarchy may have child items, and items that have children may be expanded or collapsed to show or hide the children.

properties.name: expanded
properties.description: Determines if node is in an expanded state.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: Determines whether if node is in a selected state.

properties.name: expandable
properties.description: Determines whether a node can be expandable. Expandable by default if slotted nodes exist.

properties.name: selectable
properties.description: Determines whether a node can be in a selected state. Nodes can be in a single or multi select state.

properties.name: highlighted
properties.description: Determines the highlighted state of the element. Highlighted states are for non-interactive selections where nodes may be related to other selected portions of the UI.

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

properties.name: nodes
properties.description: Returns list of child nodes

properties.name: open
properties.description: opens and sets the expanded state automatically if behaviorExpand is true

properties.name: close
properties.description: closes and sets the expanded state automatically if behaviorExpand is true

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Determines if an element is expanded, typically following a disclosure pattern. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-expanded

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Deterimines if an element is selected and part of a multi choice selection group. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility/ARIA/Attributes/aria-selected

attributes.name: expandable
attributes.description: Determines whether a node can be expandable. Expandable by default if slotted nodes exist.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Determines whether a node can be in a selected state. Nodes can be in a single or multi select state.

attributes.name: highlighted
attributes.description: Determines the highlighted state of the element. Highlighted states are for non-interactive selections where nodes may be related to other selected portions of the UI.

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

events.description: Dispatched when the node is opened.

elements.name: nve-week
elements.description: A week picker is a control that enables users to choose a week value.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Set current visaul state for control. This overrides any validation states active.

properties.name: layout
properties.description: Set current control + label + control message layout. Layouts will collapse based on available container space.

properties.name: fitText
properties.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

properties.name: fitContent
properties.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

properties.name: i18n
properties.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

properties.name: reset
properties.description: Resets control value to initial attribute value and clears any active validation rules.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Defines the visual treatment to represent a interaction status. (tasks, support, trends)

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description: Determines the overall layout of the element.

attributes.name: fit-text
attributes.description: Sets the input to match the width of the active text content of the control value. Only applicable to vertical input box type controls (input, select)

attributes.name: fit-content
attributes.description: Sets the input to match native default content block

attributes.name: i18n
attributes.description: Enables internal string values to be updated for internationalization.

## [@nvidia-elements/core-react-v1.2.2](https://github.com/NVIDIA/elements/compare/@nvidia-elements/core-react-v1.2.1...@nvidia-elements/core-react-v1.2.2) (2024-10-14)


### Bug Fixes

* **elements:** support shadow root anchor fallback ([f2393f5](https://github.com/NVIDIA/elements/commit/f2393f50f80b4f4aea8bc989b3403d36f8a3d228))

## [@nvidia-elements/core-react-v1.2.1](https://github.com/NVIDIA/elements/compare/@nvidia-elements/core-react-v1.2.0...@nvidia-elements/core-react-v1.2.1) (2024-10-14)


### Bug Fixes

* **ci:** update dependencies and package metadata ([72fc58f](https://github.com/NVIDIA/elements/commit/72fc58fc757524b669b7e002706e1c9ceb11a0c7))

elements.name: nve-codeblock
elements.description: A container for content representing programming languages.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Determines the container styles of component. Flat is used for nesting within other containers.

properties.name: language
properties.description: Programming language to be used to process the codeblock.

properties.name: code
properties.description: Text code to be process into a codeblock.

properties.name: lineNumbers
properties.description: Adds styling to show the line numbers of the codeblock.

properties.name: highlight
properties.description:
Adds styling to highlight the provided code lines.
For multiple lines: use Comma seperated values, ex: (1,5,7).
For range of lines, use hyphen seperated values, ex: (1-5).
You can combine both such as: ex: (1,5,10-15,20).

attributes.name: container
attributes.description: Determines the container styles of component. Flat is used for nesting within other containers.

attributes.name: language
attributes.description: Programming language to be used to process the codeblock.

attributes.name: code
attributes.description: Text code to be process into a codeblock.

attributes.name: line-numbers
attributes.description: Adds styling to show the line numbers of the codeblock.

attributes.name: highlight
attributes.description:
Adds styling to highlight the provided code lines.
For multiple lines: use Comma seperated values, ex: (1,5,7).
For range of lines, use hyphen seperated values, ex: (1-5).
You can combine both such as: ex: (1,5,10-15,20).

@nvidia-elements/behaviors-alpine.name: @nvidia-elements/behaviors-alpine
@nvidia-elements/behaviors-alpine.readme:
# Behaviors for Alpine

[Built with Vite](https://vitejs.dev/)

WIP

## Getting Started

```bash
# local .npmrc file
registry=https://registry.npmjs.org https://registry.npmjs.org login

# install core dependencies
npm install @nvidia-elements/behaviors-alpine
```

## Tasks

| Command          | Description                                            |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| `pnpm run build` | Build library source                                   |
| `pnpm run test`  | Run library tests                                      |
| `pnpm run ci`    | Build and run all library CI requirements (build/test) |
